creator: murduth@ludd.luth.se
text:
The new port pgp5 seems infact to be 2.6.3is (For europeans).
Infact diff between /usr/ports/pgp/Makefile and
/usr/ports/pgp5/Makefile gives no difference. Someone probably made
a mistake with the port.

Fix: 

Mark the port as broken.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/pgp5 ; make install
